news.headline: Australian BMX rider Boyd Hilder, 29, wins third gold at Simple Session 2025 in Estonia. Show-stopping victory.
news.summary: Boyd Hilder, a talented BMX rider from Australia, put on a spectacular display to win in Estonia. The 29-year-old athlete hailing from Gold Coast secured an impressive victory at Simple Session 2025. This achievement was recognized and celebrated by Monster Energy.

news.headline: Dave Asprey to host Biohacking Conference in Austin from May 28-30, 2025; new book 'Heavily Meditated' to launch.
news.summary: A forthcoming book titled "Heavily Meditated" is gearing up to be released alongside the Biohacking Conference in Austin, Texas on May 28-30, 2025. Organized by the renowned figure in biohacking, Dave Asprey, known as the "Father of Biohacking," this conference is the most awaited event in the field. It will be held at the prestigious Fairmont Hotel.

news.headline: KTL Solutions debuts new user-friendly website to help businesses navigate services and resources better. #ITConsulting #MicrosoftPartner #WebsiteRedesign.
news.summary: In Frederick, Maryland, on March 12, 2025, a renowned IT consulting company and Microsoft Partner, KTL Solutions, launched its revamped website. The new site is tailored to enhance user experience, making it simpler for businesses in search of information to navigate.

news.headline: $78 million awarded to workers with fatal silicosis due to inhaling silica dust from artificial stone; landmark legal victories.
news.summary: In a recent development on March 12, 2025, Brayton Purcell LLP successfully achieved two significant legal triumphs for workers in artificial stone fabrication. These individuals are afflicted with accelerated silicosis, a terminal lung condition resulting from exposure to silica dust. This incurable disease is linked to inhaling such particles emanating from artificial stone. The victories mark a crucial milestone for the affected workers and highlight the severity of the situation.

news.headline: Absolute Security names Harold Rivas as Chief Information Security Officer, bringing over 20 years of cybersecurity experience.
news.summary: In Seattle, Absolute Security, a prominent enterprise resilience company, has appointed Harold Rivas as the new Chief Information Security Officer (CISO). Rivas brings over 20 years of experience in cybersecurity and demonstrated leadership to his new role. He will be responsible for managing worldwide cybersecurity and information technology at the company, covering security for products and services, threat management, cyber risk and compliance, as well as security operations. The addition of Rivas to the team signifies a move towards bolstering security measures at Absolute Security.

news.headline: AB DAO expands globally, now listed on BitMart. $AB to be listed on Lbank, Biconomy. Future of Web3 discussed in HTX AMA.
news.summary: Today, on March 12, 2025, AB DAO made an announcement regarding the official listing of their digital asset, $AB, on BitMart. This move aims to boost global liquidity and increase ecosystem influence. Additionally, $AB is set to be listed on other platforms such as Lbank and Biconomy in the near future. The listing on BitMart presents a significant opportunity for AB DAO to expand its reach to a wider audience and enhance its market presence.

news.headline: Kazakhstan plans to cut oil production to comply with OPEC+.
Inventor from Benton, La., develops Overflow Fuel Catcher for boats to prevent spills; aims for fuel reuse.
news.summary: In Pittsburgh on March 12, 2025, an inventor from Benton, Louisiana, shared the inspiration behind the creation of the OVERFLOW FUEL CATCHER. The innovative product aims to tackle the issue of gasoline spills during boat refueling. The inventor highlighted the automatic feature of the device that captures and contains fuel for potential reuse. This invention is set to make a positive impact by reducing water pollution from fuel spills and promoting sustainability in boating practices.

news.headline: SEC whistleblower launches TheWhistleIsBlown.com, submits "This Nightmare Is Out of Control" to SEC Crypto Task Force.
news.summary: A recently launched website offers comprehensive information, including news, updates, and a written submission titled "This Nightmare Is Out of Control" that was directly sent to the SEC Crypto Task Force. The website is headquartered in HOWEY-IN-THE-HILLS, Florida, and the news was disclosed on March 12, 2025. The submission was made following the Freeing Howey Investment Contract Summit gathering, which attracted a significant number of participants and stakeholders.

news.headline: Bank of Russia plans to allow qualified investors to buy/sell crypto under new legal regime, following Putin's directives.
news.summary: The Bank of Russia has suggested a new three-year experimental legal framework that would permit a select group of qualified investors to trade cryptocurrencies. This proposal, announced in line with President Vladimir Putin's instructions, is aimed at "particularly qualified" investors - individuals holding over 100 million rubles ($1.02 million) in securities and deposits or with an annual income of more than 50 million rubles ($510,000), along with companies already designated as qualified investors. This departure from Russia's past hesitancy towards adopting Bitcoin as a reserve asset was outlined in a report submitted to the Russian government.

news.headline: Kazakhstan Energy Ministry: We exceeded the OPEC+ quota in February due to the expansion of the Tengiz Oil Field.
BoC's Gov. Macklem: A rise in people's medium and long-term inflation expectations would certainly be a big warning sign for us.
WillScot's subsidiary to seek Consents from holders of 6.625% Senior Secured Notes due 2029 and 7.375% Senior Secured Notes due 2031.
news.summary: Phoenix, March 12, 2025 - WillScot Holdings Corporation, a leader in temporary space solutions, announced that its subsidiary Williams Scotsman, Inc. will be seeking consents from holders of its 6.625% Senior Secured Notes due 2029 and 7.375% Senior Secured Notes due 2031. The Record Date for this solicitation is March 11, 2025. The purpose is to amend certain provisions of the indentures governing the Existing Notes. WillScot is listed on Nasdaq under the ticker symbol WSC.

news.headline: Kazakhstan Energy Ministry: Any further plans for the development of Kazakhstan's oil industry will be implemented only in strict compliance with the country's obligations and taking into account the market situation.
Kazakhstan Energy Ministry: Kazakhstan took necessary measures to compensate for the temporary increase in production.
Owen Companies acquires J&R Equipment, OK-based distributor, expanding infrastructure solutions. #Acquisition #BusinessExpansion
news.summary: ROSEMONT, Ill.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--The Owen Family of Companies, an industry leader in specialty equipment services for municipal, utility, and commercial clients in the U.S. and a Wynnchurch Capital portfolio venture, has confirmed the purchase of J&R Equipment, LLC. Based in Oklahoma City, Oklahoma, J&R Equipment is a major provider of environmental solutions. This acquisition is a strategic move to expand Owen's reach and capabilities. The financial terms of the deal, including the specifics of the transaction and the total value, were not disclosed. The agreement aligns with Owen's growth plans and commitment to enhancing its service offerings.

news.headline: Kazakhstan Energy Ministry: The current quota overrun in February is due to technological processes.
BoC's Senior Dep. Gov. Rogers: We don't expect that the supply constraints from tariffs and the trade war will run into the same surge in demand we saw during the pandemic.
Monge & Associates opens new office in Cincinnati on April 3, 2025, led by Managing Attorney Craig Belliston.
news.summary: A law firm named Monge & Associates Injury and Accident Attorneys will be launching a new office in Cincinnati, Ohio on April 3, 2025. The establishment of this office was announced on March 12, 2025 in Atlanta. The office in Cincinnati will cater to injury victims in the area and will be overseen by Managing Attorney Craig Belliston, who is a Brigham Young University graduate.

news.headline: Vye wins Content Experience Accreditation and 2024 Impact Award from HubSpot, recognized for Technical Excellence.
news.summary: In St. Cloud, Minnesota on March 12, 2025, Vye revealed that it was granted a Content Experience Accreditation and a semi-annual 2024 Impact Award for Technical Excellence by HubSpot, a prominent CRM platform catering to growing businesses. The recognition highlighted Vye's proficiency in crafting engaging content experiences for its audience, solidifying its reputation as a leader in the industry.

news.headline: BoC's Senior Dep. Gov. Rogers: the speed of pass through and the magnitude of pass through are two of the big uncertainties.
Kazakhstan Energy Ministry: Kazakhstan is committed to the OPEC+ deal.
The Word Network will exclusively air Angie Stone's funeral service in Atlanta officiated by Bishop E. [less than 100 characters].
news.summary: The homegoing service for the iconic singer, songwriter, and trailblazer Angie Stone will be exclusively aired on The Word Network, the largest African American religious network globally. Scheduled to take place in Atlanta, the service will be overseen by Bishop E., with the broadcast set for March 12, 2025.

news.headline: Mouser Electronics sponsors global design contest, offering chance to win grand prize. Intel and Analog are key partners.
news.summary: Mouser Electronics, Inc., based in Dallas & Fort Worth, Texas, has revealed its continued support as a Platinum sponsor of the Create the Future Design Contest. This global competition encourages engineers and innovators worldwide to develop groundbreaking designs for an opportunity to win the grand prize. Mouser has been a sponsor of the contest for more than ten years. Key partners for this year's contest include esteemed manufacturers Intel® and Analog.

news.headline: Market's top tech stocks, Magnificent 7, gain $250B in value after benign inflation. Relief rally or a true turnaround?
news.summary: During Wednesday morning trading, the prominent tech giants known as the Magnificent Seven collectively saw an increase of over $250 billion in market capitalization. This surge came as investors reinvested in high-growth stocks following a lower-than-expected inflation report. Just recently, this elite tech group had experienced a significant decline, with their value plummeting over 20% from previous highs, pushing them into a bear market. From their market cap peak in December 2024, where they were valued at over $17 trillion, the Magnificent Seven have since lost $3.3 trillion in value in the past few weeks. The key question now is whether this uptick signifies a genuine turnaround or is merely a temporary relief rally. The sudden rebound was triggered by a shift in market dynamics.

news.headline: Integer Technologies in SC debuts brand refresh and website to highlight digital engineering portfolio for military and commercial customers.
news.summary: Integer Technologies unveiled its brand refresh and new website in Columbia, South Carolina. The company's enhanced digital engineering portfolio is highlighted, emphasizing its commitment to converting research into practical technology for military and commercial clients. Integer collaborates with leading universities, government entities, and industry partners to translate innovative research into real-world applications. This rebranding aims to showcase Integer's dedication to helping clients improve decision-making processes efficiently.

news.headline: ACCP's new position paper questions safety of human experimental drug testing. #RiskBasedApproach #ClinicalPharmacology
news.summary: In March 12, 2025, in Ashburn, a recent Position Paper titled "Sentinel Dosing—Time for a Risk-Based Approach?" was released by the American College of Clinical Pharmacology® (ACCP). This paper delves into the safety of human testing for experimental drugs, highlighting its historical record of safety. This publication raises important questions regarding a risk-based approach to dosing, urging for a reevaluation of current practices.

news.headline: Allison Lin, co-founder of Like Air®, named to Inc. 2025 Female Founder 500 list for shaping future with innovation.
news.summary: Business Leaders who are making a mark with innovative ideas and influence are being recognized with an award. Madison, N.J. witnessed the acknowledgment of Like Air®, a renowned family-operated brand famous for its delectable puffcorn. The Co-Founder, Allison Lin, has been recently honored by Inc. This news broke on March 12, 2025.

news.headline: Dogecoin price up 6.28% in 24 hours to $0.16, reversing 16.0% weekly loss from $0.20 with all-time high at $0.73.
news.summary: The value of Dogecoin (CRYPTO: DOGE) has risen by 6.28% in the last 24 hours, reaching $0.16, diverging from the trend of the past week which saw a 16.0% decline from $0.20 to its current price. The all-time high for Dogecoin stands at $0.73. For more details, please refer to the complete article on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Block, Inc. (NYSE: XYZ) first to deploy NVIDIA DGX GB200 systems in North America for generative AI research.
news.summary: A company based in Oakland, California, Block, Inc. (NYSE: XYZ), has revealed plans to become the pioneer in North America in utilizing the NVIDIA DGX SuperPOD containing DGX GB200 systems. The deployment of this advanced infrastructure at an Equinix data center marks a significant milestone for the company. The primary objective of this deployment is to aid in the research and training of open-source generative AI models. This initiative aims to develop models with innovative features in unexplored domains. The CEO of Block, Inc. emphasized the transformative impact of AI tools on various industries and the global landscape, expressing the company's commitment to leveraging this technology for progress.

news.headline: SMArtX Advisory Solutions and BondBloxx are partnering to create multi-asset model portfolios. March 12, 2025.
news.summary: In a collaboration announced on March 12, 2025, SMArtX Advisory Solutions and BondBloxx are teaming up to create and offer multi-asset model portfolios. This partnership combines BondBloxx fixed income ETFs with top-tier equity strategies to provide investors with diversified investment options. The models will incorporate innovative approaches and aim to optimize returns for clients. This initiative merges the expertise of both companies to deliver a comprehensive investment solution. The partnership will operate from locations in West Palm Beach, Florida, and Larkspur, California.

news.headline: Egg prices rose by 10% in February, continuing their upward trend.
Management Controls Inc. introduces myAssistant AI Copilot for myTrack, powered by Microsoft Azure, enhancing user productivity.
news.summary: A global Contractor Data Management software provider, Management Controls Inc. (MCi), based in Houston, has introduced myAssistant, an AI-driven Copilot within its myTrack platform. This tool is designed to enhance user efficiency and organizational productivity. myAssistant includes Application Help and Contract Insight features, offering immediate access to crucial resources and contract details. Powered by Microsoft Azure AI Foundry, myAssistant ensures secure capabilities for its users.

news.headline: XRP price rises 3% to $2.17 due to ETF filings, despite looming tariffs. Expecting relief bounce.
news.summary: XRP, a cryptocurrency, saw a price increase to $2.17, up by 3.1% in the last 24 hours, driven by a surge in institutional interest. Deribit, a cryptocurrency options exchange, highlighted the positive influence of ETF filings on XRP's value, even with concerns about impending tariffs. In comparison, Bitcoin (BTC) was priced at $81,558, reflecting a 1.7% increase, while Ethereum (ETH) saw a slight decline to $1,860, down by 0.8%. Market analysts anticipate a relief bounce for XRP, with prominent crypto trader Johnny expressing optimism for its short-term performance. More details on this development can be found on a finance news website.

news.headline: Broadvoice won a Stevie® Award for Best Customer Satisfaction Strategy in Los Angeles.
news.summary: Los Angeles-based Broadvoice has been recognized for their exceptional customer satisfaction strategy by winning a prestigious Stevie® Award. This accolade highlights the company's commitment to providing top-notch customer service. Broadvoice's dedication to customer satisfaction is evident in their approach, leading to this impressive achievement. This award serves as a testament to their exceptional efforts in ensuring customer happiness and loyalty.

news.headline: BoC's Senior Dep. Gov. Rogers: Reality is sinking into the equity markets.
BoC's Gov. Macklem: Our estimate of neutral is centered on 2.75%.
Mexican President Sheinbaum declines to respond to US metals tariffs, will wait for the April 2nd deadline, after US duties on foreign steel and aluminum supplies take effect.
Roche signs $5.3 billion deal with Zealand Pharma for weight-loss drug, dubbed the largest obesity deal to date.
news.summary: On Wednesday, pharmaceutical companies Roche and Zealand Pharma finalized a collaboration agreement worth $5.3 billion. This deal focuses on developing a weight-loss drug belonging to the amylin class. This partnership has been highlighted as 'The Largest Obesity Deal To Date'.

news.headline: Cryptocurrency prices dropping with analysts predicting Bitcoin to fall to $73K, latest update from Investor's Business Daily.
news.summary: Stay updated on the most recent cryptocurrency prices and updates. Analysts predict a potential drop in Bitcoin value to $73,000. Find out more on Investor's Business Daily.

news.headline: Memecoins reshape market cycles-65% trading volume on Raydium-November 2024-Value driven by social engagement-Can they mature into legitimate digital economy sector?
news.summary: Sasha Ivanov, the founder of Waves and Units.Network, discusses the rise of memecoins in the crypto market. Memecoins have become a significant force, with 65% of trading volume on Raydium in November 2024 attributed to them. Despite their volatile nature, memecoins serve as entry points for retail investors into the world of crypto. Governance is crucial for their survival, with decentralized autonomous organizations offering a model for sustainability. Memecoins like Floki Inu have showcased the potential for a structured ecosystem beyond meme-driven trading. Memecoins face a crossroads, with debates between maximalists and skeptics on their future. Collaboration among builders, regulators, and communities is essential to ensure the long-term credibility of the industry. The article emphasizes that memecoins are not a passing trend but a significant force that could shape the future of the digital economy.

news.headline: Wine Enthusiast launches Cork+Compass Travel in Fall 2025, providing exclusive wine adventures and tastings.
news.summary: Valhalla, New York — Cork+Compass Travel, operated by Wine Enthusiast, provides specialized wine journeys, unique tastings, and entry to private wineries inaccessible to the general public.

news.headline: AOPO launches initiative to redefine OPO performance evaluation with validated metrics.
news.summary: In McLean, Virginia on March 12, 2025, the Association of Organ Procurement Organizations (AOPO) has revealed a new initiative. This project aims to establish validated metrics for assessing Organ Procurement Organization (OPO) performance. Through this initiative, AOPO seeks to accurately measure and evaluate the effectiveness of OPOs in their important work. This development aims to enhance transparency and accountability within the organ procurement sector.

news.headline: CEO Michael Eisenga warns of economic slowdown in the US, highlighting troubling indicators. Market turbulence feared.
news.summary: In Columbus, Wisconsin on March 12, 2025, Michael Eisenga, the President and CEO of First American Properties, has raised concerns regarding worrying economic indicators that may lead to increased instability in the U.S. markets and economy. The latest economic data indicates a possible downturn ahead, raising alarms about the future economic prospects. Michael Eisenga emphasized the need for careful monitoring of the situation to navigate potential challenges.

news.headline: Panasonic reveals OASYS™ concept home in Houston, TX, setting a vision for sustainable living in new homes.
news.summary: Panasonic unveiled its innovative OASYS™ concept home in Houston, Texas. This revolutionary home features state-of-the-art technologies aimed at enhancing comfort and introducing sustainable living options at an affordable price. The launch took place on March 12, 2025, showcasing Panasonic's vision for the future of housing.

news.headline: New social media platform Sez Us launched in Oregon to create respectful community, promote trust and authenticity.
news.summary: On March 12, 2025, in Beaverton, Oregon, a new social media platform called Sez Us is being launched. This platform aims to foster trust within a respectful community by enabling individuals to engage authentically and respectfully. The emphasis is on creating a free society based on trust, where individuals can interact positively. This initiative is focused on creating a platform for open and respectful communication among users.

news.headline: House of Dank to host 10th annual 4/20 parties with storewide discounts and exclusive deals in Detroit on April 19.
news.summary: On April 19th, House of Dank (H.O.D.), Michigan's top cannabis retailer, will hold its 10th annual 420 parties to celebrate ten years of success in the industry. The event will feature storewide discounts and exclusive doorbuster deals for customers. This milestone marks a decade of excellence for H.O.D. and promises an exciting celebration.

news.headline: MyHealthTeam launches MyCrohnsAndColitisTeam en español, a Spanish-language community for Crohn's Disease/Ulcerative Colitis patients.
news.summary: In a major development, MyHealthTeam, a subsidiary of Swoop, has introduced MyCrohnsAndColitisTeam en español, an expanded patient social network in healthcare. This new community offers approved medical information and resources for individuals with Crohn's disease and ulcerative colitis.The platform already boasts a significant following, being one of the largest patient social networks in healthcare. This move aims to cater to the Spanish-speaking population, further enhancing access to credible health-related content.

news.headline: Kathy Giusti, author and 2x cancer survivor, joins Thyme Care as advisor to improve patient experience. She established a $600M research fund and tripled patient survival rates.
news.summary: A pharmaceutical professional, who surpassed a three-year life expectancy prediction, has launched a $600 million research fund and boosted patient survival rates threefold. She is now applying her patient advocacy skills at Thyme Care in Nashville, Tennessee to address challenges within the disjointed U.S. healthcare system.

news.headline: Inventor from Harpers Ferry, W.V., creates THE WRAPPER winding device for seasonal lights, with removable spools.
news.summary: On March 12, 2025 in Pittsburgh, an inventor from Harpers Ferry, W.V., unveiled their innovative solution for storing seasonal lights. Named THE WRAPPER, the device aims to provide a tangle-free way to wind and store lights. It features a single winding device with removable options for different sizes, offering a convenient and efficient storage solution.
